title: competent-search-thing theme file
description: A theme JSON file: the embedded builtins (internal/theme/builtin/dark.json, light.json) and user themes at <configDir>/themes/<name>.json. Source of truth: internal/theme/theme.go. The file's BASE NAME (without .json) is the authoritative theme name used for lookup and 'extends' references; the 'name' field is informational. A theme does not have to define every token: anything the extends chain leaves unset falls back to the dark builtin's value. The loader ignores unknown TOP-LEVEL keys but strictly REJECTS unknown token keys and non-whitelisted token values (the theme then falls back to dark, with the error logged). Values are trimmed by the loader; this schema expects them already trimmed.

$schema.description: Optional editor hint pointing at this schema. Ignored by the app.

name.description: Informational display name. Lookup uses the file's base name, not this field.

extends.description: Optional parent theme: a builtin ('dark', 'light') or another user theme's file base name. Chains are capped at 4 themes and cycles are rejected. A user theme can extend a builtin but never shadow one.

tokens.description: The design tokens this theme sets. The key set is CLOSED (the 22 names below; anything else rejects the whole file). The frontend exposes token k as the CSS custom property --sb-<k>. Values are whitelisted: hex colors (#rgb/#rgba/#rrggbb/#rrggbbaa), rgb()/rgba()/hsl()/hsla() with numeric arguments, px/em/rem/% lengths, and bare numbers; font-family instead takes a comma-separated font list over the charset [A-Za-z0-9 ,'"-]. url(...), expression(...), @import, ';', '{' and '}' are hard-rejected.

accent.description: Accent color (also the default plugin accent via the --accent bridge).

badge-bg.description: Result badge background (reserved for plugin result badges).

font-family.description: Font stack; charset-limited, no url() or exotic syntax.

cssValue.description: Whitelisted CSS value: a hex color, rgb()/rgba()/hsl()/hsla() over [0-9,./% ], a px/em/rem/% length, or a bare number.

fontValue.description: Comma-separated font list over a tight charset (letters, digits, spaces, commas, quotes, hyphens).
